name: flow-07-mutual-connection-counter
description: T80 MutualConnectionCounter — DATA_PIPELINE archetype. Full recompute from adjacency list intersection on every invocation — never delta increment.

nodes.description: Retrieve DATA_PIPELINE arch patterns for T80: full recompute pattern, idempotent graph intersection
T80: read adjacency lists for userIdA and userIdB → set intersection → mutualCount (number only, no user ID list) → storeDocument → MutualCountUpdated emit

Generate mutual-connection-counter.service.ts: getConnections(userIdA) + getConnections(userIdB), filter intersection, count only. storeDocument('xiigen-mutual-counts', { mutualCount }) BEFORE enqueue('MutualCountUpdated'). NEVER read stored mutualCount and increment.
Score generated code 0-100 against T80 iron rules: full recompute (no delta), count only (no user ID list), DNA-8 ordering
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=full recompute from adjacency lists (idempotent), rejected=delta increment of stored mutualCount (drifts under retries). curriculumTier=1.
